acceptance.assertion: Lenskit preflight treats the supplied bundle manifest as the bundle_manifest self-role and focused tests pass.
Grabowski exposes read-only rLens bundle discovery, status, and freshness checks with tests and regenerated contracts.
Bureau schemas accept optional rlens_context_ref and focused tests pass.
The Vibe-Lab operator run card is referenced from the implementation record.

goal: Review, package, and submit the first Lenskit, Grabowski, and Bureau rLens integration changes without merging prematurely.
title: Finalize first rLens integration slice
